generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've lived in this neighborhood for 30 years, and I've seen how important it is for newcomers to embrace our shared values. My granddaughter's school has a wonderful program that helps immigrant families learn English and understand American traditions. It's heartwarming to see how these families want to belong and contribute. Studies show that communities with strong assimilation programs have lower crime rates and better economic outcomes. We should be supporting these efforts, not criticizing them. #StrongCommunities #SharedValues
